content: canvas-confetti v1.9.4: confetti.create(canvas, {resize:true, disableForReducedMotion:true}) for shared canvas pattern. confetti.reset() clears stuck particles. disableForReducedMotion option respects prefers-reduced-motion automatically. useWorker option offloads rendering to web worker but prevents main-thread canvas access. Particle count should be reduced on mobile (window.innerWidth < 768): ~40-80 particles vs 100-200 desktop. Returns Promise that resolves when animation completes.
